title: Breakdown sets issue owners against the TEAM_DIRECTIVE roster at filing time
description: Sprint 7 filed all five items with owner "builder", but TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md forbids builder from src/template content (S7-3/EXEC-082) and persistent docs (S7-5/EXEC-084); two of five were rerouted mid-sprint. When an issue's owner field is first set during breakdown (execution-to-issues / breakdown review), the owner should be resolved against the TEAM_DIRECTIVE roster's ownership boundaries, so an item's owner matches who may execute its scope rather than defaulting to one role.
acceptance_criteria: Breakdown/issue-authoring resolves each issue's owner against the TEAM_DIRECTIVE roster before the issue is filed
An issue whose scope falls under a non-builder owner (src/template, persistent docs) is filed with that owner, not builder
The check is documented where breakdown owners are assigned (execution-to-issues skill content or the breakdown-review step)
notes: Filed from the Sprint 7 retro (obs 1), 2026-06-12. Two of five S7 items needed mid-sprint owner rerouting.
